---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="theme-banner" style="--theme-bg: #4B6A88;"><div class="banner-title">COVID / Health</div><p class="banner-sub">1,257 posts where this was the primary topic.</p></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [1, 1, 11, 53, 136, 160, 31, 20, 42, 32, 55, 529, 4, 11, 65, 54, 39, 13],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#4B6A88" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>whitehouse live</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>task force</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>president realdonaldtrump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>coronavirus task</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>united states</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>press briefing</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>live press</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>briefing coronavirus</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>force https</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>http bit</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>president trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>white house</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#4B6A88'>https truthsocial</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="post-stream"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 31, 2014  21:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Ebola patient will be brought to the U.S. in a few days - now I know for sure that our leaders are incompetent. KEEP THEM OUT OF HERE!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_495027187381460992" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/495027187381460992" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 01, 2014  22:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ BarbaraSMayer: @ realDonaldTrump You are right about the Ebola patients. It&#x27;s a deadly virus</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_495414489266008064" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/495414489266008064" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2014  18:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A doctor on NBC Nightly News agreed with me-we should not bring Ebola into our country through two patients</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_496442582353055744" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/496442582353055744" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 03, 2014  08:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am being proven right about massive vaccinations‚Äîthe doctors lied. Save our children &amp; their future.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_507158574670573568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/507158574670573568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2020  22:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We are in very close communication with China concerning the virus. Very few cases reported in USA</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1221809170673958913" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1221809170673958913" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2020  16:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Working closely with China and others on Coronavirus outbreak. Only 5 people in U.S.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1223004106408833025" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1223004106408833025" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 02, 2020  06:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am meeting with the major pharmaceutical companies today at the White House about progress on a vaccine and cure. Progress being made!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1234455007765942273" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1234455007765942273" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 18, 2020  06:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be having a news conference today to discuss very important news from the FDA concerning the Chinese Virus!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1240234698053431305" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1240234698053431305" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 18, 2020  11:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @TIME: Officials said the president has authority to take such action during pandemics like the coronavirus outbreak https://t.co/F1hL6UxQfT&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1240120104135938060" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1240120104135938060" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 18, 2020  19:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I always treated the Chinese Virus very seriously</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1240243188708839424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1240243188708839424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 23, 2020  11:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;WE CANNOT LET THE CURE BE WORSE THAN THE PROBLEM ITSELF. AT THE END OF THE 15 DAY PERIOD</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1241935285916782593" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1241935285916782593" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 23, 2020  23:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realDonaldTrump: WE CANNOT LET THE CURE BE WORSE THAN THE PROBLEM ITSELF. AT THE END OF THE 15 DAY PERIOD</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1242105370509742082" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1242105370509742082" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 05, 2020  10:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @OANN: Hydroxychloroquine proving an effective treatment for coronavirus patien... https://t.co/L3imNmv1ua #OANN @PearsonSharp&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1246627587289382918" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1246627587289382918" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 19, 2020  03:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @paulsperry_: Trump’s bold gamble on hydroxychloroquine (HC) appears to be paying off. Medical professionals in NY tell Judicial Watch that doctors battling the pandemic are increasingly reporting benefits from the drug. They’re prescribing it for themselves &amp;amp; patients https://t.co/0MBRkaiRez&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1251587393955729412" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1251587393955729412" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 10, 2020  06:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We are getting great marks for the handling of the CoronaVirus pandemic</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1259450328048709633" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1259450328048709633" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 11, 2020  04:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realDonaldTrump: We are getting great marks for the handling of the CoronaVirus pandemic</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1259578095629152258" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1259578095629152258" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 14, 2020  21:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Good numbers coming out of States that are opening. America is getting its life back! Vaccine work is looking VERY promising</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1260919777301798912" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1260919777301798912" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 16, 2020  18:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SaraCarterDC: Pres. Trump Introduces Leaders Of &#x27;Operation Warp Speed&#x27; Vaccine Development Project https://t.co/GygwxQpI4n via @SaraCarterDC&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1261603127813443584" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1261603127813443584" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 16, 2020  18:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SaraCarterDC: Pres. Trump Introduces Leaders Of &#x27;Operation Warp Speed&#x27; Vaccine Development Project - Sara A. Carter https://t.co/WW5ndZCPX2&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1261605352782606343" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1261605352782606343" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 02, 2020  09:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Vaccines are coming along really well. Likewise therapeutics. Moving faster than anticipated. Good news ahead (in many ways)!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1267826457796984832" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1267826457796984832" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 22, 2020  12:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our Coronavirus testing is so much greater (25 million tests) and so much more advanced</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1274927241034715138" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1274927241034715138" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 03, 2020  11:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There is a rise in Coronavirus cases because our testing is so massive and so good</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1278897430378041344" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1278897430378041344" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2020  11:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @TheRightMelissa: 6000 doctors surveyed across the world all said #Hydroxychloroquine works in Covid patients. Multiple Studies in France found it effective. &amp;amp; yet here in America it is being suppressed to keep deaths high so the economy can be shut down ahead of the election. It’s sick!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1287947772822528000" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1287947772822528000" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2020  11:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @JohnRuddick2: &#x27;As a prof of epidemiology I have authored over 300 peer-reviewed papers. I&#x27;m fighting for a treatment the data supports but has been pushed aside. 10s of 1000s with COVID-19 are dying. It can be reversed easily and quickly.&#x27;  #hydroxychloroquine  https://t.co/dmMII8SetY&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1287949095475306497" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1287949095475306497" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 28, 2020  11:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @WarRoomPandemic: Dr. Lee Vliet: Dr. Fauci has misled the American public on many issues</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1287949972638511105" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1287949972638511105" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 06, 2020  20:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @GOPLeader: Joe Biden likes to say “No miracle is coming.”  But it’s not a miracle.  It’s SCIENCE.  And thankfully we have a president who believes in it and launched Operation #WarpSpeed so that America can develop a vaccine in record time. https://t.co/xQU21BjoEv&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1302585189445623808" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1302585189445623808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 07, 2020  21:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Starting to get VERY high marks in our handling of the Coronavirus (China Virus)</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1302961482716639233" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1302961482716639233" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 09, 2020  02:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @walidgellad: The pace of this is quite amazing. Vaccine trial started in July</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1303402249910185989" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1303402249910185989" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 11, 2020  09:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...the vaccine</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1304236585790009344" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1304236585790009344" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 16, 2020  22:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Vaccines are moving along fast and safely!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1306233683402162176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1306233683402162176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 16, 2020  22:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Another Vaccine just announced. This time by Moderna</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1328341927641681922" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1328341927641681922" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 19, 2020  20:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;VACCINES ARE COMING FAST!!!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1329402303535833088" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1329402303535833088" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 19, 2020  20:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;THE COVID DRUGS NOW AVAILABLE TO MAKE PROPLE BETTER ARE AMAZING</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1329404785083232256" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1329404785083232256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 22, 2020  12:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;They never thought a Vaccine could be done so soon but don’t worry</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1330364307335426051" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1330364307335426051" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 30, 2020  22:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Moderna now applying for Emergency Vaccine Approval.. @US_FDA MUST ACT QUICKLY!!!  “Operation Warp Speed has been a great modern day miracle.”&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1333422192261013504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1333422192261013504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 14, 2020  07:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Vaccines are shipped and on their way</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1338263195941818370" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1338263195941818370" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 25, 2020  04:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;More than one million Americans have already received the China Virus Vaccine</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1342206148649299969" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1342206148649299969" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 08, 2024  02:47</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“The Pandemic no longer controls our lives. The Vaccines that saved us from COVID are now being used to help beat Cancer – Turning setback into comeback!” YOU’RE WELCOME, JOE, NINE MONTH APPROVAL TIME VS. 12 YEARS THAT IT WOULD HAVE TAKEN YOU!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112057780615640759" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112057780615640759" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 18, 2024  02:50</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">We’re coming up on the five year anniversary of Covid, and if you recall, under President Trump’s leadership, we had incredible public health policies. President Trump’s unparalleled creation of Operation Warp Speed was one like we’ve never seen before! Dr. Janette Neishewat, FoxNews</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113501682012809641" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113501682012809641" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 01, 2025  12:15</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">It is very important that the Drug Companies justify the success of their various Covid Drugs. Many people think they are a miracle that saved Millions of lives. Others disagree! With CDC being ripped apart over this question, I want the answer, and I want it NOW. I have been shown information from Pfizer, and others, that is extraordinary, but they never seem to show those results to the public. Why not??? They go off to the next &quot;hunt&quot; and let everyone rip themselves apart, including Bobby Kennedy Jr. and CDC, trying to figure out the success or failure of the Drug Companies Covid work. They show me GREAT numbers and results, but they don&#x27;t seem to be showing them to many others. I want them to show them NOW, to CDC and the public, and clear up this MESS, one way or the other!!! I hope OPERATION WARP SPEED was as &quot;BRILLIANT&quot; as many say it was. If not, we all want to know about it, and why??? Thank you for your attention to this very important matter! President DJT</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115128985245605660" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115128985245605660" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div>
```


::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
